name: Hot and Sour Seafood Soup (Thai)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Small fresh shrimp shelled and deveined
2 Green Serrano chilies, seeded and chopped
3 Lemon grass stalks, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 Red Serrano chili, seeded and slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shrimp shells with stock, chilies, salt, lime zest, kaffir lime leaves, and lemon grass pieces in a heavy non-aluminum pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
3. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container, reserving the shells.
4. Return the liquid to the pot and place over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil.
5. Add shrimp and scallops, cooking for an additional minute.
6. Stir in fish sauce and lime juice. Add chopped cilantro, slivered red chili, and sliced shiitake mushrooms; stir well.
7. Pour the soup into individual bowls or serve from a tureen.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
